# Simple Dev Tools

> A collection of developer accelerators and studios built with Next.js, React, and TailwindCSS. Provides in-browser utilities for engineers to prototype snippets, inspect schemas, validate security tokens, generate diagrams, and automate workflows.

Simple Dev Tools is a Next.js application hosted at `https://dev-tools.helloworldfirm.com/` (production) that offers independent single-page tools with client-side interfaces. All tools run entirely in the browser with no authentication required. Built by Jonathan Reed at Hello.World Consulting using modern web technologies including Radix UI, shadcn/ui components, and various specialized libraries.

## Developer Accelerators

- [API Snippet Generator](https://dev-tools.helloworldfirm.com/api-snippet): Generate cURL, Python requests, and JavaScript fetch snippets from an endpoint, HTTP method, custom headers, bearer token, and JSON body.
- [Mermaid Editor](https://dev-tools.helloworldfirm.com/mermaid): Sketch sequence diagrams, flowcharts, and architecture visualizations quickly with live preview and export.
- [SQLite Playground](https://dev-tools.helloworldfirm.com/sqlite): Run SQL experiments against an in-memory SQLite database (sql.js WASM) with instant result tables and CSV/JSON export.
- [Regex Lab](https://dev-tools.helloworldfirm.com/tools/regex): Iterate on regular expression patterns with explainers, tests, and sharing capabilities.
- [IDs & Scheduling](https://dev-tools.helloworldfirm.com/tools/ids-cron): Generate ULIDs, UUIDs, and human-friendly CRON expression helpers with descriptions.
- [Encoders & QR](https://dev-tools.helloworldfirm.com/tools/encode-qr): Encode/decode payloads (Base64, URL encoding) and produce QR code assets (PNG/SVG).
- [Timestamp Converter](https://dev-tools.helloworldfirm.com/tools/timestamp): Convert between Unix epochs (seconds/milliseconds), ISO 8601, and time zones, with relative time and human-readable formats.
- [JSON Workbench](https://dev-tools.helloworldfirm.com/tools/json): Format, minify, validate, and convert between JSON, YAML, and CSV, sort keys, and query values by path.
- [Color & Contrast](https://dev-tools.helloworldfirm.com/tools/color): Convert colors between HEX, RGB, HSL, and OKLCH, build tints/shades, and check WCAG contrast ratios for accessibility.

## Studios

- [Schema & Types Studio](https://dev-tools.helloworldfirm.com/studio/schema): Convert sources between JSON Schema, TypeScript interfaces, Zod schemas, and preview Swagger documentation.
- [Security & Tokens](https://dev-tools.helloworldfirm.com/studio/security): Inspect JWTs, decode tokens, compute cryptographic hashes, and verify HMAC signatures using Web Crypto APIs.

## Technical Documentation

- [README](https://github.com/JonathanRReed/simple-dev-tools/blob/main/README.md): Project overview and MIT license information
- [Package Dependencies](https://github.com/JonathanRReed/simple-dev-tools/blob/main/package.json): Full list of dependencies including Next.js, React, Radix UI, Prism, Mermaid, and more

## Optional

- [Homepage](https://dev-tools.helloworldfirm.com/): Keyboard-first launcher with a searchable index of all tools (also reachable anywhere via the ⌘K command palette)
- [About](https://dev-tools.helloworldfirm.com/about/): Builder and maintenance context
- [Contact](https://dev-tools.helloworldfirm.com/contact/): Official contact paths
- [Privacy](https://dev-tools.helloworldfirm.com/privacy/): Local-first privacy notes
- [Sitemap](https://dev-tools.helloworldfirm.com/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable index of public routes
- [Robots.txt](https://dev-tools.helloworldfirm.com/robots.txt): Current crawler directives
